summary: Emits a bang event when clicked or when any input arrives.
description: Button is the Max/Pd-like bang control. Runtime clicks and incoming messages both emit event.bang without mutating the graph.
runtimeBehavior: Runtime click or any input on in emits event.bang from bang. If sendName is set, the bang is also published to the named event.bang channel.

ports.description: Accepts any incoming message or value and converts it to bang.
Emits an event.bang when the control is clicked.

params.description: Text shown on the runtime control.
Optional event.bang channel name updated whenever the button emits.
Optional event.bang channel name that can trigger this button.

example.title: Trigger a message
example.description: Use Button to trigger event-oriented nodes without changing the graph.
